{{< include latex-macros/macros.qmd >}}

:::{#thm-d_pi_d_beta}

#### Gradient of fitted probability w.r.t. coefficients

Using
@lem-d_logodds-d_vb and 
@thm-d_prob-d_logodds:

$$
\ba
\derivf{\prob}{\vb}
&= \red{\derivf{\logodds}{\vb}} \teal{\derivf{\prob}{\logodds}}
\\
&= \red{\vx} \teal{\prob (1-\prob)}
\ea
$$

:::
